The Growth Stock Hair tool is an automated trading script designed to analyze historical data, identify multi-bagger candidates, and forecast market performance. Users on financial forums like Reddit praise its time-saving capabilities and visual backtesting features, but note that it requires a solid foundational understanding of market trends.Before investing in any growth stock, perform comprehensive technical validation. Utilize the TradingView Charting Platform to overlay price action.

I began my stock market investment journey and SIPs with the Groww trading app in 2023, and it has been a great experience so far. As a beginner, I found the app extremely user-friendly and easy to understand. The clean interface, simple navigation, and clear explanations made investing feel less intimidating.

Starting SIPs and investing in stocks was smooth, and tracking my portfolio has been very convenient. Over time, I have been able to accumulate funds consistently, and I’m really happy to see that my investments are growing steadily. The app provides helpful insights and updates that keep me informed about my investments.

Overall, Groww is a reliable and beginner-friendly app for anyone who wants to start their investment journey with confidence. I’m satisfied with my experience and happy with the progress of my funds.

The app is otherwise ok and stable. While redeeming the money from MFs the app always has a default option to credit the amount to groww balance instead of bank account. A user has to manually switch to bank account each time if they dont want it to be credited to wallet. Please keep the default option as bank account and not wallet. In emergencies this manual switch is easily skipped and  then  it takes 1 additional day to transfer money to bank account from wallet which is just inconvenient. Instead the wallet should be optional and default should be bank account for crediting the redeemed balance.
